Class TypeCheckMediator

public class TypeCheckMediator extends TypeMediator implements ITypeCheckMediator

    Type
    newTypeVariable()
    Returns a fresh type variable that can be used as a place-holder when checking types.
    void
    sameType(Type left, Type right)
    Declares a type-checking constraint stating that two types must be unifiable each with the other.

      Description copied from interface: ITypeCheckMediator
      Declares a type-checking constraint stating that two types must be unifiable each with the other.
